a.xlink:title: Provides physics-related functions for C++ operations.
Provides transformation functions for momentum calculations in C++.
Defines the particle_template base class for physics particle representations.
Defines the cproperty template class for property-based access patterns.
Defines the tools class that provides general utility functions for the AnalysisG framework.
Defines metadata structures for physics analysis datasets.
Defines fundamental data structures and type handling for the AnalysisG framework.
